string.text: the
we
loners
army soldiers
bandits
Clear Sky stalkers
Duty soldiers
Ecologists
Freedom fighters
mercenaries
Monolith fighters
mutants
zombified stalkers
Sin cultists
UNISG operatives
renegades
Sorry, I don't know much about what's going on out there.
Can you share some intel about the current situation around these parts?
Can't help you with that, sorry.
Ask someone else, I've got enough to worry about.
I'm running a business here, not an information service.
Get lost before I change my mind about letting you walk away.
That's classified. Move along.
I don't share operational intel with outsiders. Move on.
Not really my problem what you know or don't know.
We don't share field data with people we don't know. Sorry.
I'm in the middle of something. Please don't disturb me.
Information costs more than you can afford. Walk away.
You're lucky I'm even talking to you. Don't push it.
The Zone's secrets are not yours to know. Leave.
Operational security. I'm sure you understand.
I have some intel, but it'll cost ya.
Alright, here's the money.
Nevermind
and
the
I'm not entirely sure but I heard that %s are controlling %s. I could be wrong though.
If I'm not mistaken %s should've taken over %s. But don't quote me on that.
Not long ago I overheard someone mention that %s are holding %s. Maybe.
I think %s are controlling %s, but I really couldn't say for certain.
Last time I talk to someone they said that %s are currently around %s, but don't take my word for it.
Last I heard, %s were holding %s.
Word is %s have taken over %s, at least that's what people are saying.
Someone told me %s claimed %s a while back.
From what I've heard, %s are dug in at %s.
%s were controlling %s last time it came up, probably still the case.
%s are controlling %s.
%s have taken over %s.
%s are holding %s.
%s are dug in at %s.
%s have control of %s.
I think there might be some trouble at %s, not sure.
Someone mentioned something going on at %s, could be a fight.
There might be fighting over %s, but I couldn't say for sure.
I vaguely heard something about trouble at %s.
Could be something going on at %s, hard to say.
Last I heard there was fighting over %s.
Word is %s is contested, at least it was a while ago.
Someone mentioned a fight breaking out over %s recently.
From what I heard there's been some shooting over at %s.
There was some action at %s last time it came up.
There is fighting over %s.
%s is a warzone right now.
There's a firefight going on at %s.
Something's going on at %s, doesn't sound good.
There's been shooting over at %s.
I think there might be trouble at %s, not entirely sure.
Someone mentioned something going on around %s, could be fights.
There might be fighting over %s, but I couldn't say for certain.
I vaguely heard something about trouble at %s.
Could be something going on at %s, hard to say.
Last I heard there was fighting going on around %s.
Word is %s are all contested, at least that's what I heard.
Someone mentioned fights breaking out over %s recently.
From what I heard there's been shooting around %s.
There was action at %s last time it came up.
%s are all contested right now.
There are firefights going on at %s.
%s have all seen some shooting lately.
Something's going on at %s, none of it sounds peaceful.
There are fights reported at %s.
%s might be empty, but I'm not sure, it's been a while.
I think %s was quiet last time someone mentioned it, maybe still is.
I'm not entirely sure but I think that %s is empty.
%s might be deserted, from what I vaguely heard.
I think %s was empty, but things change fast out here.
%s looked empty last I heard, probably still is.
From what I know %s was quiet, maybe no one there.
%s was deserted when someone passed through recently.
Haven't heard of anyone holding %s lately.
%s was quiet last time it came up, could've changed though.
%s was empty last time I checked.
%s was dead silent when I passed through.
%s was clear last time I was there.
Nobody's been holding %s, it's been empty.
%s was completely deserted last I saw.
%s might all be empty, but I'm not really sure.
I think %s were quiet last time someone mentioned them, maybe still are.
Mmmh, Let me think. %s are probably empty, but don't take my word for it.
%s might all be deserted, from what I vaguely heard.
I think %s were all empty, but things change fast out here.
%s all looked empty last I heard, probably still are.
From what I know %s were all quiet, maybe no one around.
%s were all deserted last time someone mentioned them.
Haven't heard of anyone holding %s lately.
%s were all quiet last time it came up, could've changed though.
%s were all empty last time I checked.
%s were dead silent when someone passed through.
%s were all clear last time someone was there.
Nobody's been holding %s, they've all been empty.
%s were all completely deserted last I heard.
I think there might be %s moving around %s, not sure.
Could be %s somewhere around %s, but I really couldn't say.
Someone vaguely mentioned %s around %s, take that with a grain of salt.
I might have heard something about %s near %s, but I'm not certain.
There might be %s around %s from what little I've heard.
Word is %s have been spotted around %s.
Someone reported seeing %s moving around %s.
From what I heard %s are moving through %s.
My buddy mentioned seeing %s around %s.
%s were reported in the area of %s not long ago.
%s have been spotted around %s.
There were %s seen around %s not long ago.
%s are moving through %s.
%s have been reported moving through %s recently.
There is %s activity going on around %s.
I think some of ours might be around %s, not certain.
There might be some of our people near %s, hard to say.
Could be some of ours moving around %s, from what I vaguely heard.
Someone mentioned our people near %s, but I'm not sure.
I might have heard something about our guys around %s.
Heard some of ours were spotted around %s.
Word is some of our people are moving through %s.
Someone mentioned our guys were seen around %s.
From what I heard some of ours have been around %s lately.
There might be some of ours moving around %s, last I heard.
Some of our people were seen around %s.
Our guys have been moving through %s.
Some of ours were spotted around %s.
Word is some of our people are around %s.
Our people have been reported moving through %s.
I think there might be mutants around %s, not sure.
Could be mutants somewhere near %s, hard to say.
Someone vaguely mentioned mutants around %s, take that with a grain of salt.
I might have heard something about mutants near %s, not certain.
There might be mutants around %s from what little I've heard.
Someone spotted mutants around %s not long ago.
Word is there's been mutant activity around %s.
From what I heard there are mutants moving around %s.
One guy told me there are mutants around %s, probably still there.
There have been mutant sightings near %s from what people are saying.
Mutant activity has been reported around %s.
There are mutants moving around %s.
Mutants were spotted near %s recently.
Watch out for mutants around %s.
There have been mutant sightings around %s.
